this_title: Trevor Noah: The LOST South African Show
trans_title: 特雷弗·诺亚：失传的南非专场
introduction: Trevor Noah's first South African Special in 8 years! Filmed in Tshwane in 2023 in front of 8000+ South Africans the show takes us back into the thick of all the questions we had "Cupcake has a couch?!?" "Will loadshedding ever end?!?" "Robots have new management?!?"
chinese_title: 特雷弗·诺亚：失传的南非专场
foreign_title: Trevor Noah: The LOST South African Show
